description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a global before_script that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. Define a single stage named build. Add a build job that runs in the build stage, executes docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG", and is configured to run on all branches except master. Add a build-master job that also runs in the build stage, runs docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE", and is limited to the master branch only.
